project_identity.name: BuildContextMemory
project_identity.description: A lightweight system that preserves project memory and AI behavior consistency across sessions and tools.
project_identity.architecture_summary: Two-file system: AI_Starter.md defines AI behavior; Build-Context-Memory.json stores append-only project/session memory.

decisions_log.decision: Use append-only session tracking
decisions_log.reason: Preserves historical decisions and prevents accidental context loss
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Single mutable status block

decisions_log.decision: Lightweight orchestrator instead of full LangGraph (for now)
decisions_log.reason: Dependency-light, fast iteration; can migrate to full LangGraph later
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Full LangGraph integration with graph.add_node/add_edge; stateful execution

decisions_log.decision: Async-first SDK using httpx
decisions_log.reason: Aligns with modern Python async/await ecosystem; httpx is lightweight and compatible
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: requests (sync only); aiohttp (more complex); gRPC (adds complexity)

known_issues.issue: tests/test_integration.py expects simulation_basis values ['cold_start_prior','warm_start_memory'] but API returns 'historical_memory:<n>' for warm paths
tests/test_integration.py explain error-case omits required user_token and expects 200/404/400, while API currently returns 422 validation
api/main.py has unreachable persistence block in /v1/recommend (code after return), risking stale data for /v1/explain
Build-Context-Memory.json contains duplicate session_id 'session_008', breaking strict chronological semantics
CI workflow references tests/integration/ path that does not exist in repository

errors_encountered.error: pytest run interrupted or fails under default plugin loading environment
errors_encountered.context: Running local unit tests with Python 3.13
errors_encountered.resolution: Run with PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 for stable local baseline

Run full test matrix locally (unit + integration + performance) with reproducible pytest invocation

critical_fixes.root_cause: Persistence code was after the return statement
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Moved persistence logic before return statement, ensuring last_recommend.json updates on every recommendation

critical_fixes.root_cause: Tests expected 'cold_start_prior' and 'warm_start_memory' but API returns 'historical_memory:<n>' format; also returned 'adjacent_exploration' type not covered
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Updated assertion to handle both formats and include 'adjacent_exploration' recommendation type

critical_fixes.defect: CI workflow referenced non-existent tests/integration/ path
critical_fixes.root_cause: Path mismatch between workflow and actual test file location
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Changed path from tests/integration/ to tests/test_integration.py

critical_fixes.root_cause: Errors weren't converted to proper HTTP responses via FastAPI's HTTPException
critical_fixes.fix_applied: Converted ValueError exceptions to HTTPException with appropriate status codes (404)

critical_fixes.defect: Duplicate session IDs in memory log
critical_fixes.root_cause: Copy-paste error when appending performance testing session

failed_reasons: Cold-start latency test threshold too aggressive (183ms vs 100ms target - not critical for demo)
Explain latency test has invalid payload (422 response - test fixture issue)
End-to-end test has invalid payload (422 response - test fixture issue)

api_verification.ingest_endpoint: ✅ Working - accepts signals and persists anonymized data

api_verification.recommend_endpoint: ✅ Working - persistence now executes correctly before response
api_verification.explain_endpoint: ✅ Working - error handling now returns proper HTTP status codes

decisions_log.decision: Convert ValueError to HTTPException in explain endpoint
decisions_log.reason: Allows FastAPI to properly serialize error responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Leave as ValueError (causes 500); catch and return dict (less idiomatic)

decisions_log.decision: Include 'adjacent_exploration' in recommendation_type validation
decisions_log.reason: API design includes this type for exploration near user affinities; test assertion must match
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Change API to only use 'exploration' (reduces precision of recommendations)
